title: Command Center discovery webhook (POST body)
description: Sent by the dashboard when the user clicks Run discovery. schemaVersion 1.

sourcePreset.description: Canonical source selection preset. When omitted the worker resolves a deterministic fallback from stored config and legacy enabledSources.

profileSnapshot.description: Optional non-secret snapshot of the profile/resume/preferences/schedule state used to build this run. Raw resume text is not included.

searchPlan.description: Optional deterministic search facet/query bundle used by scheduled and manual runs to rotate daily discovery.

trigger.description: Optional run-origin label recorded in DiscoveryRuns.

googleAccessToken.description: Optional. Google OAuth access token sent by the dashboard for this run only. When present, the worker uses it to call Google Sheets and skips its own service-account/OAuth-token configuration. Stripped from any persisted run record.

companyAllowlist.description: Optional. Per-run company allowlist selected from the dashboard. When present and non-empty, the worker restricts this run to matching stored companies/history entries after skipped-company filtering. Empty or omitted preserves default behavior. Never persisted.

companyBlocklist.description: Optional. When present and non-empty, suppresses listed companies from discovery results. Empty/missing means no blocklist. Strings are trimmed by the worker; entries cap at 50.

mergedUserProfile.description: Optional. The dashboard's master Fit Profile merged with any per-run drawer overrides (non-secret; raw resume text is not included). When present, the worker prefers this profile over its disk-loaded one for this run only, after validating it via ajv against the UserProfile schema. Invalid payloads are ignored with a warning. Never persisted.
